question: Will “Vance” rise at least 150 places in the 2025 American baby name rankings?
textDescription:
“Vance” is #950 in the Social Security Administration’s 2023 baby boy name rankings. This question resolves YES if, when the 2025 rankings are released, it is at #800 or higher. 

Please note that this is 150 spots from the 2023 rankings, not 2024, which aren’t out yet! Baby name rankings are typically released the Friday before Mother’s Day.
newsShortReason: Vance's ranking has been declining, making a 150-spot rise unlikely.
newsKeyEvidence: Vance ranked #950 in 2023, down from #932 in 2021. | The name peaked at #328 in 1969 and has been declining since. | No significant cultural events in 2024 likely to boost the name's popularity.
